title: NVIDIA’s Nemotron 3 Is... Awesome?
summary: NVIDIA released Nemotron 3 in three sizes: Nano, Super, and Ultra. The models combine hybrid Mamba-Transformer architecture with Latent Mixture of Experts and Multitask Token Prediction techniques to improve performance and efficiency.
writeup: The video covers NVIDIA's release of Nemotron 3, which ships in three sizes: Nano, Super, and Ultra. It details the architecture, a hybrid Mamba-Transformer design paired with Latent Mixture of Experts and Multitask Token Prediction, and explains how these techniques target gains in both performance and efficiency. The takeaway is a breakdown of how the size tiers and the combined architectural choices fit together.
